evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long contributes $640.5 on only 2 trades and owns the -655.2 worst MAE; the worst trade still made $546 after early favorable movement and later deep heat, indicating a convex recovery state rather than a simple bad entry.
name: Call-Wall Convex Recovery Monitor
risk: Can overfit a two-trade profile and cut rare convex winners unless validated against protected fast-winner retention and out-of-sample days.
trigger: call_wall_acceptance_long entry with wide target or extended ES-VWAP that fails to make sustained early progress before adverse expansion.
validation_metric: Reduce worst MAE below -655.2 toward <= -513.4 while retaining >=70% call-wall PnL, total net profit >=98% of leader, pnl_per_exposure_hour flat or better, and slow_12h remains 0.

evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY contributes 20 trades and $1315.3 with no slow trades, but direct 1DTE tightening has repeatedly been risky. A separate pullback companion may improve 1DTE MAE without weakening breakout_long_1dte.
name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
risk: The companion may cannibalize profitable breakout_long_1dte trades or be unreachable under current trigger logic.
trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state resembles pullback/reclaim rather than clean breakout continuation.
validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL stays >= $1315, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -124.6, breakout_long_1dte retained PnL is measured, and total risk-adjusted score is flat or better.
